summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Budgets page UI implementation. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend Budgets page successfully displays data-driven budget information with proper status badges, usage bars, and insights. Navigation and integration with Dashboard working correctly after getBudgets API format change.

ui_bugs.issue: FAB (+) button is present in DOM but hidden/not visible

passed_tests: GET /api/budget/smart returns {data: {budget: [...], total}, metadata, error} format ✅
Budget overview card shows total limit amount from backend (₹16,61,337.82) ✅
Usage bar shows correct percentage (89% utilized) ✅
Spent and Left amounts displayed (₹14,82,371.00 spent, ₹1,78,966.82 left) ✅
Data Insight box shows backend-provided insight with numeric values (not static text) ✅
Category cards display with icons, budget amounts, progress bars ✅
Status badges show correctly: ON TRACK (<75%), CLOSE TO LIMIT (75-100%), OVER BUDGET (>100%) ✅
ADJUST button present and functional on each category card ✅
Add Category button visible in header area ✅
Footer shows budget method label from backend ✅
Dashboard page works correctly after getBudgets API change ✅
Navigation between Dashboard and Budgets works ✅
All 9 backend API tests passed (100% success rate) ✅
Tested 9 budget category cards with proper icons and status badges ✅
Footer displays: 'Budget = historical monthly average + 1 standard deviation. Based on 47+ months of data.' ✅
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: FAB button is hidden/not visible (z-index or positioning issue). All major functionality working correctly.
